name: modulo-swap-react
description: Modulo DeFi prototype — built with BakedUX

scripts.qa:css: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const {execSync}=require('child_process');const result=execSync('grep -rn \"color: #\\|background: #\\|rgba(255\" src/ --include=\"*.css\" --include=\"*.jsx\"').toString();if(result.trim()){console.error('CSS QA FAILED — hardcoded values found:\n'+result);process.exit(1);}else{console.log('CSS QA: clean');}"
scripts.qa:gate:
npm run qa:build && echo '
--- QA GATE PASSED: build clean ---

Now run manual checks (qa-gate-process.md Step 3+4):
  swap screen loads, amounts work, Review CTA visible, Confirm button reachable on mobile

Local model audit (Step 5):
  cat src/ReviewScreen.jsx | ollama run qwen3:32b "QA audit: find layout bugs. BUG: [P1/P2/P3] [line] [description]"'
